review_text: She’s the best
My experience was actually quick & overall the pain was not as bad as I thought it would be . Highly recommend def worth the results
Excelent
Great place to get your tattoos removed. Great staff and very professional.
Staff at Sugar Land location is extremely knowledgeable and helpful throughout the process. Great service.
Such an amazing opportunity to come across a very put together location with very nice people and the process is as smooth as possible thank you so much removery ❤️
So far the treatment has been great. The tattoo is fading and I have had no skin issues with my sensitive skin during the treatment. The ladies in the office are very sweet and easy to work with.
Super friendly. Would recommend.
LOVE IT HERE THEY DO AN AMAZING JOB! Ive been doing my sessions for about a year now and I’m obsessed! Everyone is knowledgeable and will not steer you wrong!

I got their services 2 1/2 years ago.  I only  had 4 session back then the technician who did my sessions was phenomenal and the place seemed really busy at the time.  I was given a discount for my first 3 package price.  However, today, 2 1/2 years later I went back to the same Sugar Land location and was really disappointed.  Let me just say that I had called their 1-888 number and they tried to get ahold of someone at this location because I had questions about their pricing, etc.  They couldn't reach anyone and told me someone would call me back.  Well after and hour I still didn't hear back from anyone.  So I drove over to the physical location.  A Jasmine/Yasmine? was at the front desk, and the place was completely empty, no clients, no busy servicing, her phone didn't ring once while I was there, and she was completely lacking in any initiative to help me with trying to figure out about any discounts available for a returning customer and it was like pulling teeth trying to find out pricing from her.  She seemed bored with me, like I was just an annoyance.  When I asked if the same tech was there that worked on me over 2 years ago, she said no before I ever gave a name.  Then she proceeded to tell me that they had a complete change over of ALL personnel including the regional manager.  When I said, boy it seems slow today, she said "no, we are actually very busy and have a ton of clients".  Well, I saw none..LOL  Anyway, it was really a turn off and I decided to leave and go somewhere else.  As a potential customer I want someone excited to tell me about their services and costs, even if I am a returning customer.  I want someone to be excited that I walked through the door.  But what I got was a very ho hum, I am bored with you customer treatment.  I loved this place 2 1/2 years ago, but not today years later.  One other thing, she said their were zero discounts or special offers.  When I went down the street to one of their competitors I got an amazing discount on a 10 session package and was treated like they were excited I walked through the door and were anxious to show off their place and tell me about all their services and products.  Sorry Removery but you lost me as a customer for offering no discounts to a returning customer and lacking any enthusiasm or showing initiative to gain me as a customer.

I had a really great experience at this tattoo removal clinic. The staff was very professional, kind, and made me feel comfortable throughout the entire process. I was honestly expecting the pain to be much worse, but it was very manageable and not as bad as I thought it would be.

They took the time to explain everything to me, answer all my questions, and made sure I felt at ease before starting. You can tell they really care about their clients and do quality work.

I’m very happy with my results so far and would definitely recommend them to anyone considering tattoo removal!

From the jump, the whole staff was super informative and helpful with all my questions.

Gave me re assurance and multiple options to chose from including good finance options as a veteran. Very affordable if you’re serious about removing a tattoo.

6 sessions in so far and there’s definitely good results. Thank you removery!
Very welcoming place. Both of the ladies are amazing. My tattoo removal tech makes everything go smooth.
The ladies at the Sugar Land location are lovely. Great experience.

I had such an amazing experience at Removery today! I officially started my tattoo removal journey on multiple tattoos (both hands, foot, and two name tattoos), and I couldn’t be happier with my decision.

Yasmeen and Ashley were absolutely incredible. They were so kind, patient, and professional from the moment I walked in. They explained everything clearly, answered all of my questions, and made me feel completely comfortable and supported. The treatment itself was much more manageable than I expected, and they constantly checked in to make sure I was okay.

What really made this experience even better was how transparent and helpful they were with pricing and financing. I was able to get an unlimited session package with 0% interest, which made such a big difference and gave me peace of mind knowing I can continue treatments until everything is fully gone.

This was such a meaningful step for me, and I’m truly grateful for how smooth and positive they made the entire process. I highly recommend Removery and especially Yasmeen and Ashley
to anyone considering tattoo removal!
Great staff and great service.

Booked my consultation appointment online. Came in and filled out a few quick forms.

Yasmeen then spent over 30 minutes explaining the whole process, showed me examples of what to expect, and answered all my questions. I mentioned that I’ll be moving out of state soon, and she reassured me that all of my information and services transfers seamlessly to all their other locations.

Once I made the decision, I went next door for my first session with Ashley. She made sure I was comfortable and let me know exactly what to expect for my very first session. Just minutes later, I was leaving! In total I was there for 1 hour and 15 minutes (from filling out forms, to initial consultation, to treatment).

Both Yasmeen and Ashley explained everything thoroughly, step by step, without ever making me feel rushed. The whole experience felt professional, transparent, and genuine. Highly recommend!

I’ve been coming to Removery for about a year and a half now for tattoo removal, and the results have been incredible. I have a large tattoo on my lower back, and I’ve seen so much improvement over time.

My current technician is absolutely amazing — professional, knowledgeable, patient, and genuinely caring. She always makes me feel comfortable and confident throughout the process. The consistency and care she brings to each session really shows in the results.

I truly love this place and highly recommend it to anyone considering tattoo removal.
Such a professional office, very well explained. Answered all my questions. From front of the clinic to back everyone was very patient and professional. Love their energy!
So thorough with the process and definitely made me feel more at ease ! Already seeing progress on one of my smaller tattoos.
Buenos resultados hasta el momento tengo 5 secciones y todo va muy bien las chicas son geniales

I have been going to Removery for a while now. When I first started my treatments I was a little nervous because I always heard the pain was worse than getting a tattoo. I just finished my 6th treatment and I will say the staff is kind and makes me feel as comfortable as possible. The appointment scheduling is accommodating. I see major results with my treatments. I would definitely recommend this place to anyone looking for tattoo removal.

I went in for a consultation, and actually started my 1st treatment the same day. Everyone was very professional and friendly.  Everything was explained in detail, and all of my questions were answered fully. I was very pleased with my visit.
Best studio for tattoo removal ✨
Thanks!!! Always great service always very clean and professional environment
Ashley does a good job with my lasering and care within the process. My project is a challenge but im seeing a big difference  with patience  and endurance.  Thank you sm 🙏✨️🖤

Ashley is always incredibly pleasant and welcoming every time I come in for my laser treatment. She takes great care to ensure the ice has done its job before we begin, which makes the experience much more comfortable. She's very informative and always takes the time to explain things clearly. I genuinely enjoy seeing Ashley at all my appointments—her professionalism and warmth make a big difference!
i’ve been going to Removery for over a year now and Ashley has been amazing every session. She’s polite, knows what’s she’s doing and is a very well communicator!

I had my first laser tattoo removal session yesterday, and Ashley was amazing! She explained everything clearly, checked in on me throughout the process, and made sure I was completely comfortable. Her professionalism and kindness really put me at ease. Highly recommend Ashley if you’re considering tattoo removal!
I ALWAYS have a good experience when I come for my appointments/treatments The staff is very helpful, caring,, knowledgeable and professional . My husband says he can see a difference!
Ms. Yessmen who helped us is super terrific she was able to explain everything and walk us through the process very easily. She’s super wonderful!

I just had my first session at removery and I was WAY more scared than I was letting on. I was very anxious about the whole experience. Yasmeen and the laser tech made me feel super comfortable and they even helped me convince my boyfriend to be my emotional support during my first session. I look forward to continuing to work with them on this. Thanks!

I highly recommend this place for transparent communication, reliable results, and very friendly staff! Both Yasmeen and Ashley were fantastic to deal with and took their time to run through the whole procedure, answering any questions I had along the way. The pricing was actually way better I expected and they do have some great financing options. The sensation is a little like getting popped with hot grease or a static shock, but if you can sit through a tattoo you can sit through this . I've only had one session so far but I can already see some of the ink breaking down. I'm excited to see how the results progress with more sessions. Really great experience! 10/10 for staff!
The staff had me feeling very comfortable once expressing my concerns! I really appreciate their help and I look forward to the removal of my tattoo.
Very informative for a first visit. Can’t wait to see my results.
Thank You all, all do an awesome job, and I will definitely send you people who are interested in getting there tattoo removed. And again thank you for all you do.
Great consultation and staff. Very informative and thorough about the whole process. Look forward to using them for my treatment.
Great service ashley n is a great tech she help me olot with my removal!!

Best experience. Consultation was excellent with Jasmine and Ashley did the removal tattooing on my brows and was awesome. I highly recommend.
Susan
